title: lycopus lucidus var. genuinus
intro: Lycopus lucidus var. genuinus, also known as sweet marsh lemongrass or Chinese galingale, is a perennial plant native to China, Japan, and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lycopus lucidus var. genuinus include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
